helpScreen.title: AMS2 Contract Manager – Career Guide
body: Welcome to AMS2 Contract Manager, a career simulation built around the contract-driven world of motorsport. Your journey spans 21 seasons, progressing one year at a time through the eras of racing history.

Each season, you'll race a championship in AMS2, report your results, and earn three key resources: LP (License Points), RP (Reputation Points), and Earnings. LP determines which levels of racing you qualify for, RP influences the quality of contract offers you receive, and Earnings determine your financial survival.

At the start of your career, you'll choose a year and receive a bankruptcy threshold tied to that era. Your goal is to keep your total earnings above that threshold while climbing the ranks. Early in your career, many contracts will COST money - pay-driver deals are common at lower levels.

After each season, you'll receive contract offers based on your LP, RP, and the classes available in the upcoming year. Higher-tier contracts may span multiple seasons, but poor performance can lead to early termination. Strong results can open doors to promotions and better-paying opportunities.

Your dashboard tracks your active contract, season history, and career progression. Each season concludes with a media-style summary that reflects your performance, reputation, and contract situation.

Your career is shaped by your decisions, your results, and the evolving landscape of racing. Choose wisely, perform consistently, and navigate the financial and competitive pressures of the motorsport world.

careerEnd.headline: <Driver> Concludes an 18-Year Career
commentary: After nearly two decades of competition, your journey through the world of motorsport comes to a close.
Your career featured triumphs, challenges, and defining moments that shaped your legacy.
You retire with total earnings of $<Earnings>, marking the final chapter of your racing story.
